_comment: Single source of truth for app-it-static's desktop-build.sh, desktop-quit.sh, and desktop-rebuild.sh. Copy this file to scripts/app-it.config.json and customize. This is the STATIC schema — it serves a FINISHED build, never a dev server.

_fields.name: Display name. Non-ASCII OK (e.g. 'Momó Studio'). Substituted into Info.plist CFBundleName and the bundle's directory name.
_fields.slug: File-safe slug (lowercase, hyphens). Used for assets/<slug>-icon.png plus namespaced app-it runtime and log paths.
_fields.serve_mode: 'server' (default) runs the bundled static-server.py (~15 MB, SPA-aware) and is robust for any build. 'file' loads the build straight from disk via file:// with NO server (~0 MB), but only works when asset paths are relative, there is no client-side routing, no fetch of local files, and no service worker.
_fields.static_dir: Path (relative to the repo root) to the built output that contains index.html. Common: dist (Vite/Astro/Vue), build (CRA/SvelteKit), out (Next static export), . (plain static site).
_fields.port: server mode only. Preferred port; the launcher scans [port..port+50] for a free one and records the actual port to ~/Library/Application Support/app-it/<slug>/server.port. Default range starts at 4100 to stay clear of dev-server ports (3000/5173).
_fields.bundle_id: Reverse-DNS bundle identifier. Default 'com.user.<slug>'. NEVER 'com.<your-mac-username>.*' — LaunchServices may reject with error -600.
_fields.build_command: Used by desktop-rebuild.sh to refresh the served snapshot, e.g. 'npm run build'. Empty string if the build is produced some other way.
